requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 for PV Inverters — Singapore EMA / Enterprise Singapore Framework
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——新加坡EMA / 新加坡企业发展局框架
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——新加坡EMA / 新加坡企業發展局框架

summary.en: Singapore's EMC framework for PV inverters draws on IEC standards adopted through the Singapore Standards (SS) framework administered by Enterprise Singapore. The relevant EMC standards are IEC 62920 (Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment) and IEC 61000-3-2 (Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions for equipment with input current up to and including 16 A per phase). EMA's Handbook for Solar PV Systems references IEC-aligned technical requirements for grid-connected PV inverters, and project-owner procurement specifications for commercial and industrial PV installations typically require IEC 62920 EMC test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory. For smaller household-type inverters, Enterprise Singapore's Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Registration (CPSR) may additionally require EMC compliance evidence as part of the registration dossier. Confirm the applicable EMC scope and registration requirement with Enterprise Singapore (enterprisesg.gov.sg) before export.
summary.zh: 新加坡光伏逆变器EMC框架依据新加坡企业发展局管理的新加坡标准（SS）框架采用的IEC标准。相关EMC标准为IEC 62920（光伏发电系统——功率变换设备的电磁兼容要求和测试方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（电磁兼容——每相输入电流不超过16 A的设备谐波电流排放限值）。EMA《太阳能光伏系统手册》引用了并网光伏逆变器的IEC符合技术要求，商业和工业光伏装置的项目业主采购规格通常要求来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62920 EMC测试证据。对于较小型家用逆变器，新加坡企业发展局消费品安全要求注册（CPSR）可能还需要EMC合规证据作为注册文件的一部分。在出口前请向新加坡企业发展局（enterprisesg.gov.sg）确认适用的EMC范围和注册要求。
summary.zht: 新加坡光伏逆變器EMC框架依據新加坡企業發展局管理的新加坡標準（SS）框架採用的IEC標準。相關EMC標準為IEC 62920（光伏發電系統——功率轉換設備的電磁相容要求和測試方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（電磁相容——每相輸入電流不超過16 A的設備諧波電流排放限值）。EMA《太陽能光伏系統手冊》引用了併網光伏逆變器的IEC符合技術要求，商業和工業光伏裝置的項目業主採購規格通常要求來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62920 EMC測試證據。對於較小型家用逆變器，新加坡企業發展局消費品安全要求登記（CPSR）可能還需要EMC合規證據作為登記文件的一部分。在出口前請向新加坡企業發展局（enterprisesg.gov.sg）確認適用的EMC範圍和登記要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment (adopted via SS framework, Enterprise Singapore)
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase) (adopted via SS framework)
Enterprise Singapore Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Registration (CPSR) — may require EMC evidence for household-type inverters (enterprisesg.gov.sg)
EMA Handbook for Solar PV Systems — IEC-aligned technical requirements for grid-connected PV inverters (ema.gov.sg)

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is assessed under GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which includes EMC test requirements aligned with China's domestic framework. GB/T 37408 EMC testing is conducted at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. While IEC 62920 draws on IEC 61000-series test methods used in Chinese domestic standards, the GB/T 37408 EMC test scope and referenced limits are not harmonised with IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 as required for Singapore EMA project submissions. Chinese EMC certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 are not accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 compliance evidence for Singapore project or CPSR registration submissions.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC依据GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）进行评估，其中包含与中国国内框架相符的EMC测试要求。GB/T 37408 EMC测试在中国CNAS认可实验室进行。尽管IEC 62920借鉴了中国国内标准中使用的IEC 61000系列测试方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC测试范围和引用限值未与IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2协调，不被新加坡EMA项目提交接受为合规证据。仅基于GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不被接受为新加坡项目或CPSR注册提交的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC依據GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）進行評估，其中包含與中國國內框架相符的EMC測試要求。GB/T 37408 EMC測試在中國CNAS認可實驗室進行。儘管IEC 62920借鑑了中國國內標準中使用的IEC 61000系列測試方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC測試範圍和引用限值未與IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2協調，不被新加坡EMA項目提交接受為合規證據。僅基於GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不被接受為新加坡項目或CPSR登記提交的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC test requirements

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC testing does not satisfy Singapore's IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements for EMA grid-connection project submissions or Enterprise Singapore CPSR registration (where applicable). Exporters should obtain: (a) IEC 62920 EMC type-test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model; (b) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission test report for the model. These reports should be specific to the power rating and configuration of the inverter being supplied to Singapore. Where harmonics test results were obtained under Chinese grid conditions (220/380 V), confirm with the project engineer or Enterprise Singapore whether retesting under Singapore grid conditions (230/400 V, 50 Hz) is required.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408 EMC测试不满足新加坡EMA并网项目提交或新加坡企业发展局CPSR注册（如适用）的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。出口商应取得：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室、涵盖所供应特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验报告；（b）该型号的IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放测试报告。上述报告应针对供应至新加坡的逆变器功率等级和配置。若谐波测试结果在中国电网条件（220/380 V）下获取，应与项目工程师或新加坡企业发展局确认是否需要在新加坡电网条件（230/400 V、50 Hz）下重新测试。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408 EMC測試不滿足新加坡EMA併網項目提交或新加坡企業發展局CPSR登記（如適用）的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。出口商應取得：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室、涵蓋所供應特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗報告；（b）該型號的IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放測試報告。上述報告應針對供應至新加坡的逆變器功率等級和配置。若諧波測試結果在中國電網條件（220/380 V）下取得，應與項目工程師或新加坡企業發展局確認是否需要在新加坡電網條件（230/400 V、50 Hz）下重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 evidence is expected for commercial and industrial EMA grid-connection project submissions in Singapore; CPSR registration with Enterprise Singapore may additionally require EMC evidence for household-type inverters — confirm scope with Enterprise Singapore
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408 EMC testing is a requirement for voluntary CQC/CGC certification; not a standalone mandatory market-access requirement for domestic China PV inverters

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not satisfy Singapore's IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements for EMA grid-connection submissions or Enterprise Singapore CPSR registration. Obtain IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model before project or registration submission. Confirm whether Singapore grid voltage conditions (230/400 V) require retesting compared to test results obtained under 220/380 V Chinese grid conditions. Confirm CPSR registration applicability for your inverter type at enterprisesg.gov.sg.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不满足新加坡EMA并网提交或新加坡企业发展局CPSR注册的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。在提交项目或注册申请前，须从ILAC认可实验室取得特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告。请确认新加坡电网电压条件（230/400 V）是否需要相较于中国220/380 V电网条件下的测试结果重新测试。请在enterprisesg.gov.sg确认您的逆变器型号是否适用CPSR注册。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不滿足新加坡EMA併網提交或新加坡企業發展局CPSR登記的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。在提交項目或登記申請前，須從ILAC認可實驗室取得特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告。請確認新加坡電網電壓條件（230/400 V）是否需要相較於中國220/380 V電網條件下的測試結果重新測試。請在enterprisesg.gov.sg確認您的逆變器型號是否適用CPSR登記。
